key.name: city
key.description: Example values: Ljubljana, London, New York.

key.name: country-code
key.description: Use ISO country code like SI, DE, IT. Empty means auto pick.

key.name: location-name
key.description: Human-friendly label saved from the location search result.

key.name: latitude
key.description: Latitude saved from the chosen search result. Empty means resolve by city name.

key.name: longitude
key.description: Longitude saved from the chosen search result. Empty means resolve by city name.

key.name: timezone
key.description: Timezone saved from the chosen search result. Empty means automatic provider timezone.

key.name: units
key.description: Metric uses Celsius and km/h, imperial uses Fahrenheit and mph.

key.name: refresh-minutes
key.description: How often the extension refreshes weather data.

key.name: show-location-in-panel
key.description: Display the current location name before the weather icon in the panel.

key.name: panel-position
key.summary: Top bar section for weather indicator
key.description: Choose where to show weather in panel: left, center, or right.
